query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A plant with elongated green leaves is illuminated against a dark background. Warm light creates bright highlights along the edges of the foliage, with leaves rising from central stems in shades of green and golden-yellow.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A plant with elongated green leaves is rendered with intentional motion blur, causing the foliage to streak and smear into sweeping trails of green and warm golden light against a dark background. The botanical subject is abstracted into fluid gestures and luminous shapes, prioritizing color, movement, and impressionistic form over representational clarity.
